The team will be without one of their key players, as rising star Nico Paz is expected to be sidelined due to an ankle injury sustained in their previous match against Lazio. arts.sum: "I played with him when he was young, now he's more of a man and a great player," he said shortly before Milan's Serie A clash with Cagliari. Marcus Rashford has moved a step closer to AC Milan after the Italian giants offloaded Noah Okafor .
